text:
wxs         2011-05-27 01:10:53 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/seccure     Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
    security/seccure/files patch-Makefile 
  Log:
  - Update to 0.4.

    after removing the anti-spam measure.
  - Cleanup COMMENT and pkg-descr.
  - Also, respect PREFIX.
  
  PR:             ports/157361
  Submitted by:   Ryan Steinmetz <rpsfa@rit.edu>
